# Page 1^page=1
AAS Solutions Summit 2026 Agenda Date/Time: 11. June 2026, 10:00h – 17:00h with Barbeque Get-together starting at 18:00h Location IDTA, Lyoner Straße 18, 60528 Frankfurt (c/o VDMA) 9:30 Registration | Welcome Coffee 01 | 10:00 Opening and Introduction • Agenda • News from the IDTA Meik Billmann, IDTA Christian Mosch, IDTA 02 | 10:15 Pitch Block #1 (15 min per Pitch) • Trust by Design: The Battery Pass as a Key Enabler of the Circular Economy • Standardized Data Exchange Across the Lifecycle: ABB’s AAS Initiative for Industrial Engineering Use Cases • Industrial BaSyx – from open source to an industrial production solution • Q&A (5 min) Michael Roegner, HEITEC Nafise Eskandari, ABB Alwin Hoffmann, Xitaso Frank Schnicke, Fraunhofer IESE 03 | 11:05 Conplement’s Customer Solution • Efficient creation and integration of digital twins with twinsphere Matthias Dietrich, Conplement 11:35 Coffee Break #1 | Marketplace 03 | 12:05 Pitch Block #2 (15 min per Pitch) • Digital Twins in backend processes with twinsphere and TWINPORTAL • Productive AAS Use Case: Product Change Notifications • COMOS and Teamcenter: Benefits of using AAS in both engineering systems with Siemens Data Exchange Connect (DxC) Sezai Colak, R. Stahl Matthias Dietrich, Conplement Thorsten Jankowski, EPLAN Christian Noppenberger, Siemens

# Page 2^page=2
• Tag It, Twin It, Track It: Low-Effort Digital Product Passports at Scale • Q&A (5 min) Peter Hensel, Codewerk 13:10 Lunch Break | Marketplace 04 | 14:20 Pitch Block #3 (15 min per Pitch) • Leveraging AAS in SAP BNAC for Efficient Asset Data Collaboration and DPP creation. • Siemens Assetfox enables standardized X-Company Data Exchange with AAS • Open Source as an Architectural Decision: Making AAS Productive • Q&A (5 min) Oleksandra Ostapenko, SAP Thiago Weber Martins, SAP Arastoo Barji, Siemens Lukas Arslan, Siemens Rolf Engesser, M&M Software Jens Achenbach, M&M Software 05 | 15:10 Neoception’s Customer Solution • Digital Data Chain Consortium (DDCC) – Implementation of this Use Case as a Scalable Starting-Point for the DPP (Customer: WIKA) Luca Schulte, Neoception Andreas Wick, Neoception Jürgen Reiser, WIKA 15:40 Coffee Break #2 | Marketplace 06 | 16:10 Solve the DPP with the AAS and create added value Juilee Tikekar, IDTA 07 | 16:20 Asset Data eXchange Hub – Shared Services for AAS-based Data Exchange Sandeep Rudra, IDTA 08 | 16:30 AAS in Pharma – Foundations for the Pharma Open Data Space Rene Fischer, Roche 09 | 16:50 Presentation of the Winner of the AAS Solution Award 2026 Meik Billmann, IDTA 17:10 Closing of the Solutions Summit 2026 18:00- 21:00 Barbeque get-together @ Astropark, Lyoner Straße 9 (in walking distance from the summit venue)

# Page 3^page=3
Date/Time: 12. June 2026, 9:00h – 11:00h Location IDTA, Lyoner Straße 18, 60528 Frankfurt (c/o VDMA) 9:00- 11:00 Workshop #1: How to get started with • AAS and DPP • Data sharing with the Asset Data eXchange Hub (MX Port Leo) Juilee Tikekar, IDTA Sandeep Rudra, IDTA 9:00- 11:00 Workshop #2: AAS at Scale - How you productively create and share AAS across different repositories, dataspaces and use cases in your Business / Company Luca Schulte, Neoception Andreas Wick, Neoception Please register individually for the workshops.
